subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the rays of the light emanating from the dawning place of mysteries! Hasten to attain true salvation
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بسطوع نور اشرق من مطلع الاسرار حی علی الفوز العظیم حی علی النور
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
